% This is generated by ESQL's CommandDocsTests. Do not edit it. See docs/reference/query-languages/esql/README.md for how to regenerate it.

```esql
FROM (FROM employees)
| WHERE emp_no >= 10091 AND emp_no < 10094
| SORT emp_no
| KEEP emp_no, languages
```

| emp_no:integer | languages:integer |
| --- | --- |
| 10091 | 3 |
| 10092 | 1 |
| 10093 | 3 |
